description: This file defines the LocalDb class for managing local database operations related to notes and users, including schema creation, CRUD operations, and querying notes and tags, using the sqflite package.

classes.name: LocalDb
classes.description: A singleton-like class managing local database operations for notes and users, including schema creation, note upsertion, soft deletion, listing notes with filters, and listing tags.

methods.name: open
methods.description: Initializes and opens the database, creating schema if necessary, and returns a LocalDb instance.

methods.name: _noteToRow
methods.description: Converts a Note object into a Map suitable for database insertion or update.

methods.name: _rowToNote
methods.description: Converts a database row Map into a Note object.

methods.name: upsertNote
methods.description: Inserts or replaces a note in the database.

methods.name: deleteNote
methods.description: Soft-deletes a note by setting is_deleted flag.

methods.name: listNotes
methods.description: Retrieves notes for a user filtered by optional query and tag filter, ordered by updated_at descending.

methods.name: listTags
methods.description: Lists all unique tags used by non-deleted notes for a given user.
